title: thelypteris convergens
intro: Thelypteris convergens, also known as the Convergent Lady Fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Thelypteridaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Thelypteris convergens include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the immune system. The plant is typically prepared as a tea or infusion by steeping the fronds in hot water, although it can also be used in tincture or capsule form.
